descr: ESPN Sports Connection lets family and friends connect and play the most popular sports from a new perspective. Developed specifically for Nintendo's Wii U system to take full advantage of its unique tablet controller, the game lets gamers play solo, team up in co-op to experience new gameplay possibilities, or compete in multiplayer challenges in events that cross six popular sports: soccer, football, baseball, tennis, golf, and karting.

【游戏简介】

ESPN Sports Connection lets family and friends connect and play the most popular sports from a new perspective. Developed specifically for Nintendo's Wii U system to take full advantage of its unique tablet controller, the game lets gamers play solo, team up in co-op to experience new gameplay possibilities, or compete in multiplayer challenges in events that cross six popular sports: soccer, football, baseball, tennis, golf, and karting.
